title: No output in editor nodes when using queue mode
symptom: When executing a node in n8n, the editor shows 'No output data returned', requiring users to check the Executions tab for results.
root_cause: In queue mode, n8n processes executions differently, which prevents live output from being displayed in the editor. This is designed to enhance stability and performance but can slow down the development process.
fix_steps: Set EXECUTIONS_PROCESS=main in your environment variables
agent_instruction: Change the EXECUTIONS_PROCESS setting to 'main' and restart n8n to see live outputs in the editor.
